issue: Springhollow MUD, TX Unlimited Tax Bonds, Series 2025

extracted.issuer: Springhollow MUD, TX Unlimited Tax Bonds, Series 2025

source_excerpt:
[PAGE 1]
SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL STATEMENT 
 
relating to 
 
$7,500,000 
SPRINGHOLLOW MUNICIPAL UTILITY DISTRICT 
(A Political Subdivision of the State of Texas Located in Hays County, Texas) 
UNLIMITED TAX BONDS, SERIES 2025 
 
This Supplement to Official Statemen t (this “Supplement”) supplements the Official Statement dated October 23, 
2025 (the “Official Statement”) relating to the above re ferenced Bonds and is dissem inated to correct certain 
information contained on pages 8, 22, 31 and 35.  In particular, such information and tables are revised to include 
certain debt being concurrently issued with the Bonds to reflect the District’s outstanding debt.  Except with respect 
to information provided by this Supplement, the Official St atement shall remain in full force and effect as to the 
matters covered therein.   
 
 
SELECTED FINANCIAL INFORMATION 
 
Average Annual Debt Service Requirement of the Bonds  
(“Average Requirement”) (2026-2050) ........................................................................................... .... $ 3,183,993 
 
Tax Rate required to pay Average Requirement based upon  
2025 Certified Taxable Assessed Valuation at 95% collections .......................................................... $ 0.994 3/$100 AV 
Estimated Taxable Assessed Valuation at 95% collections (as of August 7, 2025) ............................. $ 0. 9142/$100 AV 
 
 
Maximum Annual Debt Service Requirement of the Bonds  
(“Maximum Requirement”) (2045) ................................................................................................ ..... $ 3,772,581 
 
Tax Rate required to pay Maximum Requirement based upon 
2025 Certified Taxable Assessed Valuation at 95% collections .......................................................... $ 1.178 1/$100 AV 
Estimated Taxable Assessed Valuation at 95% collections (as of August 7, 2025) ............................. $ 1. 0832/$100 AV 
 
 
Impact on District Tax Rates:  Assuming no further development, the value of the land and improvements currently within the 
District will be the major determinant of the ability or willingness of the District property owners to pay their taxes.  The 2 025 
Certified Taxable Assessed Valuation is $337,099,862 (see “SELECTED FINANCIAL INFORMATION”).  After issuance of the 
Bonds, the Maximum Annual Debt Service Requirement will be $3, 772,581 (2045) and the Aver age Annual Debt Service 
Requirement will be $3,183,993 (2026-2050, inclusive).  Based on the 2025 Certified Taxable Assessed Valuation of $337,099,862, 
a tax rate of $1.1781/$100 assessed valuation,  at a 95% collection rate, would be ne cessary to pay the Maximum Annual Debt 
Service Requirement, and a tax rate of $0.9943/$100 assessed valuation at a 95% co llection rate would be necessary to pay the 
Average Annual Debt Service Requirement.  See “Table 1 – De bt Service Requirements” and “TAX DATA – Tax Adequacy for 
Debt Service.” 
 
  

[PAGE 2]
